title: Manchester City pull off comeback win against Southampton to reach FA Cup final
description: Nico González’s late winner gave Manchester City a 2-1 FA Cup semi-final win over Southampton, who had taken a 79th-minute lead
content:
What a barnstorming finish to this FA Cup semi-final that featured three goals in eight minutes and ended with Nico González as the hero who swept Manchester City to a historic fourth consecutive final.
The Spaniard’s winner came in the 87th minute. ... [3795 chars]

title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
description: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.
content:
The Mexican government says twoUS agents who died last weekend in a car crash had not been authorised to operate in the country.
The officials, who reportedly worked for the CIA, had taken part in a raid on suspected drug labs in the northern state o... [2900 chars]

title: Trump cancels his envoys’ Pakistan trip for Iran ceasefire negotiations
description: Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner were to travel to Islamabad to attempt to revive ceasefire negotiations
content:
Donald Trump said he has told US envoys not to go to Pakistan for more talks with Iran, shortly after Tehran’s top diplomat left Islamabad late on Saturday.
Trump added to Fox News: “They can call us anytime they want.” The White House on Friday said... [3791 chars]

title: Key figure in Mandelson vetting row will not give evidence in front of MPs
description: The Foreign Affairs Committee says Ian Collard will only be giving evidence in writing.
content:
A key figure in the row over Lord Mandelson's vetting will not appear before a parliamentary committee of MPs to give evidence.
